title: 菊花賞の後に・青空を駆けた雲

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Clear as the blue skies above Kyoto Racecourse,
the track below is awash in bright sunshine!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...I won.

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Whoooaaa?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky's the winner?! But Special Week got so
much better!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Th-that was incredible! I've never seen a race like
that before!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The cheers, the applause, the surprise... Everyone
in the audience has realized the biggest star this
whole time was none other than Seiun Sky.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Heh... haha!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! Hehehe! This is what I'm talking about!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: This is what I've been after!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Wow... I feel incredible. ♪

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sei!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Congrats! You were incredible!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm so glad I was able to run in the Classic Triple
Crown with you! I mean it, congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: But... I'm not gonna lose anymore.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Heh. That's right, you did declare war against me.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Then I'll see you on the track!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two rivals show their mutual respect for
making it through the Classics. And as the
curtains close on the Kikuka Sho, the crowd
explodes with cheers at the sight of this beautiful
scene.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
C'mon! This is the triumphant return of the Kikuka
Sho champion! Cheer and celebrate, Trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, thank you. I am the greatest
Umamusume ever after all. ☆

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Well, to tell you the truth, it was really brutal out
there, but I won somehow!
choice_data_list: You won because of your skill.
You won because of your skill.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Heh... I guess you're right.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Anyway, did you see Spe's face back there?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
She still hasn't had her fill! She's gonna make me
work myself to the bone all over again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sky smiles bitterly as she says this, but at the
same time, she seems to be enjoying herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On our way home from the race, Sky is
surrounded by a large number of fans.

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's Seiun Sky! That was an amazing race
today!

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
I can't wait to see you in the Arima Kinen! Good
luck!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: The Arima Kinen? Am I running in that?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The year-end Grand Prix—the Arima Kinen...
Many set this race as a goal, but Seiun Sky hasn't
given it any thought yet.

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
Oh... I figured since you won the Kikuka Sho that,
well, the next one would be a given...

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
With this momentum, you can beat Grass Wonder
and prove that you're the top of your generation!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Ohh, so Grass is gonna be there?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I see... The top of my generation, huh...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
That's a good enough reason for me. Guess I'm
running in the Arima Kinen then.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
It's not like I had anything else in mind. This works
out pretty great.
choice_data_list:
The other racers are the best of the bunch. Are
you sure you can handle that?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Wow, how can you say that? After we just went
for the Triple Crown together, no less! ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Things'll work themselves out, just like they
always have.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
And I have a feeling something really cool is
gonna happen. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As simply as that, Sky's fans have talked her into
her next goal... the Arima Kinen!
